title: Epic Adventures
description: This mod add various new systems, like custom scaling level system, scaling experience system, capability system, classes, and much more!
body:
This mod changes all you know about minecraft, adding classes, new enemies, new system like mana system, changing HUD, and much much more!

_**This mod is in beta stage! That means, that it may changes, and in future releases must create new world!**_

- Actually its add wings with fly system, stats, new level system, fight system changed, tier system for imbued items, new system for mobs.
 
- Anti speed runners/try hards players system, its impossible to kill end´s dragon without leveling and with good equipment, more or less.
 
- Enchants can be level up! up to level 32767! new enchants will be added in future.
 
**You will need CuriosApi and GeckoLib.**

All recipes in image tab, also can be seen with JEI mod.

 

To Do:
- New boat(Drakkar)
- New spell system
- New combat art system
- New item that let change class.
- New shield items.
- New axe items.
- New bow items.
- New tridents and others items.
- Maybe new Dimension
 
I will update as fast as i can.
